title: Creamy Canadian Seaweed Chowder
description: A rich and satisfying Mexican-inspired seafood soup with a creamy twist.
instructions: Heat the canola oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and minced garlic. Cook, stirring occasionally, until softened (about 5 minutes).
Add the chopped seaweed and stir for 1-2 minutes.
Pour in the chowder mix and chicken broth, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10-15 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro or scallions, if desired.
